content:
✔ Environment & Setting Influence
• Each week’s setting has an elemental effect that alters skill checks.
• Example: A Stormy Gothic Night gives advantages to Air or Shadow-Aligned Characters.
• Example: A Sunlit Greek Temple buffs Light-Aligned Characters and Weakens Shadow-Based Ones.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures weekly setting changes have mechanical effects.
✔ Adds another layer of strategy beyond just XP and abilities.
✔ Encourages diverse playstyles.

📜 3. Resurrection Mechanics – The Cost of Bringing Back the Lost

📜 Resurrected artifacts are now ONLY available to the top and bottom players—but there’s a cost.

✔ The Conservation of Energy Rule:
• Nothing is gained without sacrifice.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 450 (chunk 450/555)
